text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The only thing Mr. C.B. follows in life is the rule of
her heart, and today, I'm here to ascertain just
how strong that way of living makes her.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Wow, that was some rain! Think it might start
coming down again later?

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Sure seems like it. And look, the track has gotten
all wet and soft! It's going to be impossible for
anyone to overtake the lead on that track.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You didn't even come with an umbrella? In any
case, how are you feeling, C.B.?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: I feel perfect. Were you waiting for me?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Knowing you, I figured it would be smart to
prepare a towel for you. Take it and dry yourself
off in the waiting room.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Haha. It's like you're psychic. Thanks, Rudolf.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Think little of it. Everyone has different ways of
conditioning themselves.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I hope you'll show me your flawless running today.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Dang, Mr. C.B. was soaking wet. I wonder if she
ran here.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Maybe she's feeling desperate. It won't be easy
for her to close the gap on her competition in bad
weather.
choice_data_list:
(Sure, the weather puts her at a disadvantage,
but...)

(Sure, the weather puts her at a disadvantage,
but...)

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
(Man, the rain is great! It's nice how the raindrops
hit my face and how mud goes flying everywhere.)

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
(It's probably reckless to chase after everyone on
such a churned-up track, especially after
exhausting myself.)

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
(I might not be able to run like normal. I guess
that's a given, though.)

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
But I don't care if that's the case. I refuse to bow
to those assumptions.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The race begins. The turf gets torn up, and the
track is barely visible. Just as expected, it's a
mess out there.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Yikes. They're all visibly exhausted! I guess it's a
done deal for the one in the lead...
choice_data_list: (It may seem that way for now, but—)
(It may seem that way for now, but—)

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Hang on! Look! In the back!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Here comes Mr. C.B. closing in from behind! She's
taken the lead!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: There it is... The path ahead is mine!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
You're kidding me! She turned this whole thing
around despite the weather?! That's incredible!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Yeah... That's a nice sight.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
I knew it. It doesn't matter what anyone does or
says. I just have to follow the compass of my
heart.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Just like I did today.

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Wow! That power's unbelievable! How does she
run so freely?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The untethered Umamusume who walks down her
path—and her path alone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After seeing Mr. C.B. prove her unwavering
strength, I'm filled with motivation to do even
better myself.
